summary: Bootstrap markdown-first local memory and constraint system for repository loop harness.

Self-check passed for memory and constraint bootstrap: AGENTS.md is short, .ai-loop files are non-empty, constraints include evidence/overreach/scientific correctness/stop rules, and recovery files are usable.
Use AGENTS.md as the only root bootstrap entrypoint and merge former agent.md content into .ai-loop memory.
Distinguish .agents runtime assets from .ai-loop durable project memory and synchronize reusable .ai-loop templates into loop-standard.
Add evidence ledger, skill trigger matrix, phase gate automation, and project-local loop evolution file to the harness.
Fix the harness as a script-core plus Codex plugin distribution model while keeping project state in each project's .ai-loop directory.

Verified unified wrapper and skill linking with parse checks, Test-LoopStandard, doctor, and temporary project behavior covering init, link-skills, fullstack pass, physics artifact block, force override, and broken skill link block.
Converge the harness around global-callable install layout, generated shim, plugin validation, recovery summary, and compatibility wrapper forwarding.

Verified install shim, doctor, project init, skill linking, fullstack gates, physics missing-artifact block, force override, broken skill link block, missing-status recovery block, compatibility wrappers, README UTF-8, and Test-LoopStandard.
Adopt Markdown plus JSON artifact integrity: Markdown for human audit, artifact-manifest.json for gate validation.

Verified artifact manifest generation, audit integrity summary, hash mismatch blocking, missing row blocking, missing file blocking, empty file blocking, missing manifest blocking, installed shim compatibility, physics skill blocking, and wrapper compatibility.
